description: 26V triple-channel 13-bit I2C shunt current and bus voltage monitor

Configuration.name: Configuration
Configuration.description: Configuration register controls operating modes, conversion times, averaging, channel enables, and operating mode.

fields.name: RST
fields.description: Reset bit. Set this bit = 1 to generate a system reset that is the same as a power-on reset (POR). This bit resets all registers to default values and self-clears.

fields.name: CH1_en
fields.description: Channel enable mode. These bits allow each channel to be independently enabled or disabled. 0 = Channel disable 1 = Channel enable (default)

fields.name: CH2_en
fields.description: Channel enable mode. These bits allow each channel to be independently enabled or disabled. 0 = Channel disable 1 = Channel enable (default)

fields.name: CH3_en
fields.description: Channel enable mode. These bits allow each channel to be independently enabled or disabled. 0 = Channel disable 1 = Channel enable (default)

fields.name: AVG2
fields.description: Averaging mode. These bits set the number of samples that are collected and averaged together. 000 = 1 (default) 001 = 4 010 = 16 011 = 64 100 = 128 101 = 256 110 = 512 111 = 1024

fields.name: AVG1
fields.description: Averaging mode. These bits set the number of samples that are collected and averaged together. 000 = 1 (default) 001 = 4 010 = 16 011 = 64 100 = 128 101 = 256 110 = 512 111 = 1024

fields.name: AVG0
fields.description: Averaging mode. These bits set the number of samples that are collected and averaged together. 000 = 1 (default) 001 = 4 010 = 16 011 = 64 100 = 128 101 = 256 110 = 512 111 = 1024

fields.name: V_BUS CT2
fields.description: Bus-voltage conversion time. These bits set the conversion time for the bus-voltage measurement. 000 = 140μs 001 = 204μs 010 = 332μs 011 = 588μs 100 = 1.1ms (default) 101 = 2.116ms 110 = 4.156ms 111 = 8.244ms

fields.name: V_BUS CT1
fields.description: Bus-voltage conversion time. These bits set the conversion time for the bus-voltage measurement. 000 = 140μs 001 = 204μs 010 = 332μs 011 = 588μs 100 = 1.1ms (default) 101 = 2.116ms 110 = 4.156ms 111 = 8.244ms

fields.name: V_BUS CT0
fields.description: Bus-voltage conversion time. These bits set the conversion time for the bus-voltage measurement. 000 = 140μs 001 = 204μs 010 = 332μs 011 = 588μs 100 = 1.1ms (default) 101 = 2.116ms 110 = 4.156ms 111 = 8.244ms

fields.name: V_SH CT2
fields.description: Shunt-voltage conversion time. These bits set the conversion time for the shunt-voltage measurement. The conversion-time bit settings for V_SH CT2-0 are the same as V_BUS CT2-0 (bits 8-6)

fields.name: V_SH CT1
fields.description: Shunt-voltage conversion time. These bits set the conversion time for the shunt-voltage measurement. The conversion-time bit settings for V_SH CT2-0 are the same as V_BUS CT2-0 (bits 8-6)

fields.name: V_SH CT0
fields.description: Shunt-voltage conversion time. These bits set the conversion time for the shunt-voltage measurement. The conversion-time bit settings for V_SH CT2-0 are the same as V_BUS CT2-0 (bits 8-6)

fields.name: MODE3
fields.description: Operating mode. These bits select continuous, single-shot (triggered), or power-down mode of operation. These bits default to continuous shunt and bus mode. 000 = Power-down 001 = Shunt voltage, single-shot (triggered) 010 = Bus voltage, single-shot (triggered) 011 = Shunt and bus, single-shot (triggered) 100 = Power-down 101 = Shunt voltage, continuous 110 = Bus voltage, continuous 111 = Shunt and bus, continuous (default)

fields.name: MODE2
fields.description: Operating mode. These bits select continuous, single-shot (triggered), or power-down mode of operation. These bits default to continuous shunt and bus mode. 000 = Power-down 001 = Shunt voltage, single-shot (triggered) 010 = Bus voltage, single-shot (triggered) 011 = Shunt and bus, single-shot (triggered) 100 = Power-down 101 = Shunt voltage, continuous 110 = Bus voltage, continuous 111 = Shunt and bus, continuous (default)

fields.name: MODE1
fields.description: Operating mode. These bits select continuous, single-shot (triggered), or power-down mode of operation. These bits default to continuous shunt and bus mode. 000 = Power-down 001 = Shunt voltage, single-shot (triggered) 010 = Bus voltage, single-shot (triggered) 011 = Shunt and bus, single-shot (triggered) 100 = Power-down 101 = Shunt voltage, continuous 110 = Bus voltage, continuous 111 = Shunt and bus, continuous (default)

Configuration.name: MASK_ENABLE
Configuration.description: Mask/Enable Register. This register selects which function is enabled to control the Critical alert and Warning alert pins, and how each warning alert responds to the corresponding channel. Read the Mask/Enable register to clear any flag results present.

Channel1.name: CHANNEL_1_SHUNT_VOLTAGE
Channel1.description: Averaged shunt-voltage measurement for channel 1. Negative numbers in twos complement format. Full-scale range = 163.8mV; LSB = 40μV.

fields.name: SIGN
fields.description: Sign bit. 0 = positive number 1 = negative number in twos complement format

Identification.name: DIE_ID
Identification.description: This register contains a factory-programmable identification value that identifies this device as an INA3221. This register distinguishes this device from other devices that are on the same I^2 C bus. The Die ID for the INA3221 is 3220h.
